name: BAFF 2
short_description: A minimalist, hardcore, and challenging drag-and-drop game in the avoid-em-up genre that will test your reflexes, timing, and planning! This game is as hard as hell!
detailed_description:
BAFF 2 — minimalist, hardcore, and challenging drag-and-drop game in the avoid-em-up genre that will test your reflexes, timing, and planning!

In this game you have to play for the eye, which must collect all the crystals at the level to activate the portal, which will move it to the next level. Collect crystals without touching the walls, avoid traps and try to control yourself, because this game is difficult as hell!

In BAFF 2:

- 50 levels
- Traps
- Eye
- Crystals
- Timer
- Minimalistic art
- Achievements
